reviews.review_description: THEY DID IT. But it sucks.. first you dont get your month of nitro if you already had nitro... second it just randomly closes.. third there is no shop.... fourth just doing it on the web is so much better lol dont download save space.. bye twin 🥹🤞

At random times the discord application will completely close all running games and it is a bit annoying. I’m not sure why it does it, but I would like to have it fixed, that way I can play my games in peace while being able to hear for any discord notifications. Other than that big issue, it’s a great app! It’s significantly more simple and easy to use than any discord apk file or the standard website browser and allows me to actually receive notifications when it is closed.

reviews.review_title: DO NOT DOWNLOAD USE THE BROWSER.
reviews.review_description: horrible horrible horrible. first off, you can't even get the one month free if you had nitro at all, second, it crashes randomly and it's extremely buggy, third, there's not even a shop you can buy stuff in. do not download safe space on your headset for better things.

reviews.review_title: Crashes after sharing your screen for 5m
reviews.review_description: It's great to finally have Discord on Quest! I also love the little VR status you have now! But sadly the app crashes after about 5 minutes of screen sharing when playing stuff 😅 I played Beat Saber, shared my screen both at max quality (the 60 fps one) and then afterwards at 480p30 and discord just closed itself after a while

Discord NEVER gave me an email, notification, nothing when i downloaded and launched the app. Ive spent twenty minutes looking for this supposed "promo code". And yes, im giving discord one star just because i didnt get the nitro they promised. False advertisement at its best. Also, you cannot flip your camera in call, so another reason for my review rating being one star.
Now you don't have to sideload a APK to use native discord, after so many years. I think it still has crashing issues under load. So it could randomly close if you are in a intensive game.
I DIDN'T GET MY FREE NITRO WHY DID YOU LIE

reviews.review_title: Its ok? Abd a good start
reviews.review_description:
Its nice to have discord on the quest bc i dont have to use a side browser or apk for it
.

I do wanna point out

A- the app crashes every few mins
B- The lack of features is slightly annoying.
C- The whole free nitro doesnt work so it feels disloyal... Even tho its likely a bug and glitch i still believe its slightly disloyal... But yea

I give a 3 its defo amazing good job
Hope it gets improved from there

reviews.review_title: Discord has finally come to Meta.
reviews.review_description:
Ive been waiting a while for this so I don't have to stop playing just to check my messages, I can just view them from my headset. 
Now there are some bugs but they might get fixed in the future and when you get a notification it shows like a Meta message or notification.

Yeah sure there’s a few bugs and stuff and the nitro is fine it’s just I feel like people dont understand that all apps pretty much start somewhat like this and then over time bug fixes happen and boom. Also it’s irritating how people are annoyed at the nitro because they already have nitro and I’m guessing it’s not adding an extra month

W im one of the first ppl to use this anyways W for
 the free nitro but why we gotta have a payment method bru not everyone got a creditcard but W we dont have to use the one on google no more

You can only get the free nitro for a month if you NEVER had regular nitro within the past 12 months. Should’ve put on the notification, ‘free 1 month for new users’ or something like that so it’s less misleading. The reviews for this app will now be low stars because of the misleading promise, great job! Low ratings but you got everyone’s attention hm?

I have to type this quickly, since my headset crashed the first time I tried writing this. The crashing is certainly a problem due to discord.

There are a few features missing , i noticed that. friend nicknames and keybinds are missing in my experience.

I have't tried calling yet so i'll edit this when i do.

There are some things i would like (notifications on the headset for one).

Now it's basically just like the app on pc except in vr. Does everything the same you can join calls and text, it's all the same. You can even share you screen while playing which is amazing. But after a good 5-10 minutes of you having it open it closes the app which gets really annoying since there's no fix. But once they fix it it'll be amazing. Also Nitro for 30 days does work and it's amazing thank you.

There's a serious issue with crashing that happens every 15 or 20 minutes of running and hopefully they patch it out. Other than the crashing it's the same old discord app. BTW you can't get a free month of nitro if you are already have a subscription you silly meta quest users.

reviews.review_title: FINALLY Discord is officially on Meta
reviews.review_description:
They did it let's go!!
You don't have to sideload an APK anymore yippee
cant claim my free nitro

reviews.review_title: It's here officially and that broke it
reviews.review_description: It's broken. If you have APK installed - don't get this. Lemme explain. I had APK installed before getting this. I could not find Discord on store (my OS updated the same day), but I could get it from URL on webpage. After "installing" it, it did not install anything, it just now runs the APK i had officially - it also disappeared from unknown sources where I had it before. Now when I view it on store I have an update available but it refuses to update to a newer version. So really I did not get anything out of it and can't stream my screen (it starts and immediately stops), it's the same version. However, additionally to that, I now got constant crashing that pulls all other apps open with it - that did not happen with my old APK installation before. I will try to fiddle with it but so far the immediate response is to not install it in any scenario before the crashes are fixed.  **UPDATE**: Removed APK, had to do restart for headset and I got the official-official version running. It can stream now,  looks like desktop not mobile version, but it still crashes everything I have open on headset every few minutes - streaming or not, as long as Discord is open it crashes.

reviews.review_title: its not the app guys chill tf out
reviews.review_description:
Its the headset BC i open up my browser and use discord it still closes within 5 minutes. Y'all need to chill and let The meta team work on it yes it's in the store. But please be patient with the developers. By now they may be working on it and fixing it. It could be resolved by tomorrow. ITS IN BETA

Update: Its the headset not a discord problem

i completely get its going to be buggy as it only launched today, but the fact that you cant redeem the nitro if you already had it actively is kind of messed up, nowhere does it say anything about this to my knowledge. I love discord٫ but this is just bad. crashes and closes everything every 5minutes or so even after uninstalling٫ doesn't go away after restarting headset٫please fix this. I do not want to factory reset my headset a second time.
